raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eij un fapulzina tohs J-
raēta Wezzajus/ un fakft us
teem: Tas KUNGS juhsfu Teh-
wu Deews irr man parahdijees/
tas Deews Ahbrāāma/ Ihsāāka
an Jehkaba/ un fazzijis: Es pee-
nckledams esmu peemeklejis juhs/
in kas jums Egiptes-Semmē
arrihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad efmu es fazzijis : Es
veddiſchu juhs us augfchu no to
Egiptern Spaidifchanas us to
Kananiteru/ un Getiteru/ un A-
noriteru/ un Meresiteru/un Ge-
viteru/ un Jebusiteru Semmi/
ts weenu Semmi/kas ar Peenn
in Meddu tekk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee klaufihs tawn Bal-
i/ un tew buhs eet ar teem Isra-
ta Wezzajeem pee to Egiptern
Achnipu/ un us to ta fazzijt:
Tas KUNGS to Gebreern
Deetws irr muns fastappis. Un
m laid jelle mehs treijo Deeno
Bahjumu Tukfineti eetam/ ka
nehs tam KUNGAM muhsfu
Deewam warram uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr es finnu/ ka tas tad
Egiptern Rehnisch juhs ne taus pee Semmes/ un tas mette wiꞥſch-
ett/ ka ween zaur weenu fiipru
Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es issteepfchu favuſsus behdfe preeſsch winnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dohſchu teem Eau-
dim Schehlastibas to Egipteri
Preeſschā/ un kad juhs iseefeet,
tad juhs tuſchi ne iseefeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ikweenai Seewa-
buhs no faxwas Kaiminas/ un ne
tahs Gaspaschas/ kurras Nam-
mā winna peemahjo / prāſſih-
Selta- un Sudraba-Rihkus un
Drehbes/ tohs buhs jums us juh-
jeem Dehleem un Meitahn likt/
un teem Egiptereem atxeent.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
Trihs Brihnuma-Sihmes/ kas Mobsum Wa-
raās Preeſschā ja darra : 1. Mobsus weh-
aissbildinojahs jawas gruhkas Mehles pehz-
10. Tad peedohd Deews winnam Aāronu/
winna Brahli: 14. Tā no=eet wiꞥſch uhs
Egiptes-Semmi : 18. Zipora apgwisa us
Zettu favu pirmdsimmuschu Dehlu: 24. Un
wiꞥſch teiz Aāronam un teem Wezzajeem ta
KUNGA Wahrdū: 27.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad atbildeja Mobsus un
Ffazztja: Bet rangi/wiꞥ-
xi man ne tizehs/ ned-
kanfihs mannu Balfi/ jo tee faz-
zihs: Tas KUNGS tew ne irr
parahdijees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzija
us to: Kas tew irr tavā Robkā?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija : Sislis;
mett winnu
nu pee Semmes/tad ktud wiꞥſch
par weenu Tschubſchku/ un Moh-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
